GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=44739242
  GpuFilterExec
    GpuScanExec: batch_size=44739242
--- memory ---
total_cost=120
GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, input_bytes=24, output_bytes=24, cost=48
  GpuFilterExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, input_bytes=24, output_bytes=24, cost=48
    GpuScanExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=24, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=24, cost=24
